# BEBrowserDataExportManager

**Class**

A class that handles exporting browsing data to other browsers.

## Declaration

```swift
class BEBrowserDataExportManager
```

## Overview

This class coordinates the transfer of browsing data by presenting an *export sheet* when someone exports data through your app’s UI (see [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataExportManager/requestExport(for:token:completionHandler:)]). Call this class’s [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataExportManager/exportBrowserData:completionHandler:] to stream browsing data to the system. For more information and details about the export sheet, see [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/transferring-browsing-data-to-another-browser].

## Creating an export manager

- **init(scene:)**: Initializes an export manager with your app’s window scene.

## Exporting browser data

- **exportBrowserData(_:)**: Exports the given browser data.
- **requestExport(for:token:completionHandler:)**: Requests that the system display the browsing-data transfer sheet to export data to another browser.

## Managing export tokens

- **exportTokenUserInfoKey**: A key for accessing the data transfer token in the export launch activity’s info dictionary.
- **exportTokenUserInfoKey**: A key for accessing the data transfer token in the export launch activity’s info dictionary.
- **userActivityType**: A constant that identifies the launch activity for data export requests.
- **userActivityType**: A constant that identifies the launch activity for data export requests.

## Data export management

- **BEExportOptions**: Options that identify data to export.
- **BEExportMetadata**: Metadata that describes available browser data for export.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
